headline: SEPT develops technologies that make decentralized energy systems safer, smarter, and more sustainable.

body: Solar Sense is the first product line, focused on solar safety, NEC rapid shutdown compliance, and intelligent module-level monitoring.

headline: From central plants to millions of rooftops.

body: As the electric power shifts from centralized power plants to millions of rooftop systems, the industry needs a smarter way to monitor, diagnose, and ensure the safety of the people.

headline: Coastline of homes with rooftop solar at sunset

body: Solar Sense is a smart safety device engineered to make rooftop solar safer, smarter, easier to monitor, and easier to maintain.
Solar Sense transforms each solar panel into an intelligent, controllable, safety-aware node — detecting faults in real time and enabling rapid shutdown when it matters most.
Solar Sense brings together what the industry has tried to solve in pieces — sensing, diagnostics, safety, and architecture — into a single device class designed for distributed solar.

headline: Panel-level intelligence
body: Voltage, current, and temperature measured at every module — granular visibility, not just system-level averages.

headline: Real-time fault detection
body: Machine-learning models identify shading, hotspots, electrical anomalies, and early degradation as they happen.

headline: Integrated safety control
body: Built-in switching enables rapid shutdown — protecting firefighters, technicians, and building occupants on demand.

headline: Scalable module architecture
body: One device per panel, designed for residential, commercial, and research installations alike.

headline: Rooftop solar runs at dangerous voltages.

body: Residential and commercial solar systems operate at dangerous DC voltages — and even when the grid is down, panels keep producing electricity. That creates a serious safety risk for the people closest to the system.

Solar Sense closes that gap with sensor and machine-learning technology that makes rooftop solar smart and safe — detecting faults in real time and enabling rapid shutdown to protect the people on every rooftop.

headline: Join us in making rooftop solar smarter and safer.
Firefighters
body: Rapid shutdown gives emergency responders a safe path to the roof.

headline: Maintenance crew
body: Module-level visibility and rapid shutdown help protect maintenance crews from dangerous DC exposure while they troubleshoot and service the array.

headline: Building occupants
body: Safer rooftop solar for the people who live and work under it every day.
